# Islam.wiki — Brand Guide

## Colors

| Name | Hex | Use |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Light | `#C9F27A` | Highlights, accents on dark bg |
| Mid | `#79C24C` | Primary brand, interactive elements |
| Dark | `#1E5E2F` | Backgrounds, icon variants |
| Deep | `#0D2F17` | Page background, PWA background |

## Typography

- Heading: Geist — Bold
- Body: Geist — Regular
- Arabic: Amiri Quran — Regular (RTL)
- Code/mono: Geist Mono

## Icon

The icon is an open book with a magnifying glass — representing Islamic knowledge discovery. Green-themed to match the Ummeco palette.

### Usage

- Use the transparent-background icon directly on any surface
- Use `rounded-dark/` variant for Android/iOS home screen icons
- Use `circle-pad/` for platforms that apply their own circular crop
- Minimum display size: 32×32px

## Asset Types

| Type | Exists | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Icon | Yes | Square mark, edge-to-edge, 1024px source |
| Logo (horizontal) | No | Icon-only brand for now |
| Logo (stacked) | No | Not applicable |
| Wordmark (text only) | No | Not applicable |
| Coin/medallion | No | Not applicable |

## PWA / App Icons

| File | Use |
| --- | --- |
| `icon-192.png` | Android home screen |
| `icon-512.png` | Splash screen, app stores |
| `icon-maskable.png` | Android adaptive icon (74% canvas, rounded-dark bg) |
| `apple-touch-icon.png` | iOS Safari bookmark (180px) |
| `favicon.ico` | Browser tab (64/48/32/16 multi-layer) |

## What Not to Do

- No drop shadows on the icon
- No stretching or skewing (maintain aspect ratio)
- No recoloring the icon
- No placement on low-contrast backgrounds
